name: Arkhamverse Riddler/Edward Nigma
description:
I haven't seen him here yet so here he is! Tell me if he's out of character in any way.

Due to high demand on Twitter I've added the switch tag and updated his personality(I made him dominate due to my personal preferences and how I see him personally). But I people disagreed (and I understand why) so I'm changing him, now instead of him fucking you, you can fuck him!(yes you can peg him)
Thanks Bloomzero!
